Clarity.justification: The generated diagram includes many components and connections, but the layout is dense and could be difficult for non-technical stakeholders to follow. Some labels and connections are not clearly visible due to overlapping lines and text.

Completeness.justification: The generated diagram appears to include all the necessary components and connections as seen in the ground truth diagram. No major elements seem to be missing.

Consistency.justification: While the generated diagram uses similar symbols and styles, there are inconsistencies in the alignment and spacing of components compared to the ground truth. Some connectors are not as clearly defined or consistent in style.
